items.name_cn:
!!️Full Original Retail Packaging!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Sheepskin Medium Tote/Shoulder Bag~Black Leather
This handbag uses Matelasse craftsmanship, with a three-dimensional texture and exquisite feel bringing a new interpretation to the classic silhouette. The front letter logo cleverly echoes the metal hardware, exquisite workmanship is outstanding, showing a distinctive classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with modern charm.
~Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
~Zip closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB124.
Size: W24×H17×D7.5cm
Color: Black Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation

items.name_en: Classic and timeless, this Chanel white quilted bag is a fashion favorite. Black and white contrast outlines a refined silhouette, the iconic double-C logo exudes luxury, and paired with a sparkling chain, it's eye-catching whether worn on the shoulder or crossbody. Carry it to effortlessly navigate the city; every step is a focal point. Model 4515. Dimensions 11.5*18.5*11.

items.name_en: Small Size 🚩🚩🚩 CHANEL 25P Chaebol Heiress Look Summer New Vacation Item The double-C buckle is ceramic, very exquisite and elegant, suitable for many occasions. Horse lovers are falling in love with Chanel again ~ 🎖️🎖️🎖️ Black with white 🐻‍❄️ color CF Cherry Blossom Season ~ As if the season of cherry blossoms turned into a bag, wow ~ Every part of the bag 💖 reveals the breath of spring. The atmospheric styling is like a girl's cheek, 🤩 gentle and charming ~ Simply carrying it can emit a sweet yet elegant princess temperament. She is simply a healing existence, making every day of girls 👧 full of sweetness and gentleness la la! Small Size: 12.5 X 19.5 X 3.5 CM

items.name_en: 💖With full original red box packaging💖【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This small shoulder bag features a adjustable shoulder strap with grommets, inspired by the equestrian world.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original red box packaging💖【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This small shoulder bag features a adjustable shoulder strap with grommets, inspired by the equestrian world.
Beige and white new GG monogram coated canvas
Beige leather trim with contrasting stitching
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Grommet adjustable handle; Height 16cm - 27cm
Interior: 1 open pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap (Height 47cm - 57cm)
Zipper closure
Model: 815218.
Dimensions: 24.5cm (W) x 16cm (H) x 5cm (D)
Color: Beige/Original leather.
Weight: approx. 0.25kg
Made in Italy
